content.query:
-- LEAVER VIEW

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_leavers
AS
SELECT DISTINCT

lv.EmployeeLeaversID
,lv.EmployeeID  as PersonID
,lv.ReasonForLeaving
,lv.EmploymentEndDate as LeaveDate
,cal.CalendarYear as LeaveYear
,cal.CalendarMonth as LeaveMonth
,cal.FinancialYear as LeaveFY
,cal.MonthOfYear as LeaveMonthNumber
--,lv.IsActive

FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_leavers_dim] lv

LEFT JOIN [default].[dbo].[calendar_dim] cal 
ON cal.CalendarDate = lv.EmploymentEndDate

WHERE lv.IsActive = 'Y'
and   lv.EmployeeID IS NOT NULL
--and lv.EmployeeID = 389
GO

--All joiner dates from standardised

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_first_join_date
AS
SELECT DISTINCT
pers_no as EmployeeNumber
,org_start_date as RoleChangeDate
,LEFT(org_start_date, 4) as RoleChangeYear
,RIGHT(LEFT(org_start_date, 10),2) as RoleChangeMonth
,CASE
WHEN reason_for_action in ('Permanent Appointment', 'Temporary Appointment', 'Fixed Term Appointment', 'Transfer from OGD', 'Secondment In Paid'
,'Loan in Paid') THEN 'Joiner'
ELSE 'Role Change' END as RoleChangeType
,reason_for_action as RoleChangeReason 
,employee_group
FROM [odw_standardised_db].[dbo].[hr_saphr]

UNION

SELECT DISTINCT
pers_no as EmployeeNumber
,org_start_date as RoleChangeDate
,LEFT(org_start_date, 4) as RoleChangeYear
,RIGHT(LEFT(org_start_date, 10),2) as RoleChangeMonth
,CASE
WHEN reason_for_action in ('Permanent Appointment', 'Temporary Appointment', 'Fixed Term Appointment', 'Transfer from OGD', 'Secondment In Paid'
,'Loan in Paid') THEN 'Joiner'
ELSE 'Role Change' END as RoleChangeType
,reason_for_action as RoleChangeReason 
,employee_group
FROM [odw_standardised_db].[dbo].[sap_hr_historic]
GO

select distinct reason_for_action  from [odw_standardised_db].[dbo].[sap_hr_historic]
UNION
select distinct reason_for_action  from [odw_standardised_db].[dbo].[hr_saphr]

--CREATE JOINERS VIEW

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_joiners
AS
SELECT DISTINCT

 emp.EmployeeID as PersonID
,emp.EmployeeNumber
--,min(frst.EmployeeStartDate) as EmployeeStartDate
--,max(frst.EmployeeStartDate) as CurrentRoleStartDate
,EmployeeStartDate


FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_employee_fact] emp
LEFT JOIN mipins.vw_mipins_hr_first_join_date frst
ON emp.EmployeeNumber = frst.EmployeeNumber

--Group by  emp.EmployeeID, emp.EmployeeNumber
GO

--select * from joiners

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW mipins.vw_mipins_hr_joiners_detail
AS
SELECT DISTINCT

 st.PersonID
,st.EmployeeNumber
,st.EmployeeStartDate
--,st.CurrentRoleStartDate
,cal.CalendarYear as StartYear
,cal.CalendarMonth as StartMonth
,cal.FinancialYear as StartFY
,cal.MonthOfYear as StartMonthNumber

FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_joiners st

LEFT JOIN [default].[dbo].[calendar_dim_plus] cal 
ON cal.CalendarDate = St.EmployeeStartDate

WHERE St.EmployeeStartDate <> '00/00/0000'
--WHERE --st.EmployeeNumber = '50426368'
GO





SELECT DISTINCT

 --st. PersonID
st.EmployeeNumber
,st.EmployeeStartDate
,cal.CalendarYear as StartYear
,cal.MonthOfYear as StartMonthNumber
--,cal.CalendarMonth as StartMonth
--,cal.FinancialYear as StartFY

FROM mipins.vw_mipins_hr_joiners st

LEFT JOIN [default].[dbo].[calendar_dim_plus] cal 
ON cal.CalendarDate = St.EmployeeStartDate

--WHERE
--st.EmployeeNumber = 50426846

WHERE 
St.EmployeeStartDate <> '00/00/0000'
--AND cal.MonthOfYear = 12
--AND cal.CalendarYear = 2022
AND EmployeeNumber in (500588)
--GROUP BY cal.MonthOfYear, cal.CalendarYear
--ORDER BY cal.MonthOfYear
